question: What is the relation between the sliced peaches and the grilled meat in the image? Select from the following options: (A) They are mixed together. (B) They are separated by the slices of tomato. (C) They are not touching. (D) The peaches are on top of the grilled meat.
answer_choices: They are separated by the slices of tomato
The peaches are on top of the grilled meat
